seoTitle: Flametree vs Flaxton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Flametree and Flaxton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Flametree and Flaxton.
heading: Flametree vs Flaxton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Flametree, Queensland and Flaxton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Flametree has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Flaxton (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Flametree or Flaxton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Flametree has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Flaxton scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Flametree scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Flaxton scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Flametree or Flaxton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Flametree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
